title: Firework Cooldown
description: Gives firework rockets a cooldown after using them to boost an elytra
body:
# Features
- Whenever you use any firework rocket to boost yourself with an Elytra, all of your fireworks will go on cooldown for a default of 45 seconds
### This change will:
- Make other methods more viable in comparison to the Elytra
- Make higher level rockets more viable as they have the same cooldown but allow you to travel further
# Configuration
- To change the cooldown time, use the gamerule `/gamerule fireworkCooldown [ticks]`
# Compatibility
- This mod is compatible with any mod that adds different types of Elytras, such as Cataclysm
